case_title: JULIAN SARKAR VS. ARTELIA MACK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARKAR, JULIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MACK, ARTELIA UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. RASIER, LLC. RASIER-CA, LLC CASE AGAINST UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC, & RASIER-CA, LLC ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARKAR, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MACK, ARTELIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED JAN-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASIER, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT RASIER, LLC. RASIER-CA, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JULIAN SARKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTELIA MACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARTELIA MACK WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACQUELINE PARA, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT RASIR-CA LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACQUELINE PARA, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT RASIR LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JACQUELINE PARA, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANTS UBER, RASIER-CA LLC, AND RASIER-LLC ALL WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC., RASIR-LLC AND RASIER-CA LLC ARE ALL DISMISSED FROM THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,486.46 FILED BY SARKAR, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MACK, ARTELIA UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. RASIER, LLC. RASIER-CA, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED JAN-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASIER-CA, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 - SERVED JAN-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
